name: 9GAG
description: Operator of an online platform and social media website designed to share user-generated content. The company's online platform and social media website provides comical images that features user-generated videos under categories such as fail and prank, comedy, game, TV and music, providing users with an engagement platform for fun, conversation and connection.

name: Ailumia
description: Operator and developer of an IT consulting platform. The company's platform is empowered by artificial intelligence technology to guide every aspect of their retail process, providing customers and sellers with solutions and resources for potential challenges in the e-commerce industry.

name: Airbility
description: Developer of high-speed electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft featuring distributed fanjet systems and modular hybrid power systems, allowing safe and quiet medium to long-range transportation.

name: Alluva
description: Developer of an analyst marketplace designed to discover investment opportunities. The company's platform quantitatively and qualitatively rates cryptocurrencies by using a contributor model that rewards users for correct calls, enabling investors with an improved market movement understanding.

name: Alphaus
description: Developer of a software-as-a-service platform designed to seamlessly automate the daily operations of cloud lifecycle management. The company's platform helps AWS (Amazon Web Services), Azure & Google Cloud partners, and user enterprises to understand complicated cloud spend, allocate it to each client or business unit with accuracy, and optimize it with a better way of procurement, enabling businesses to optimize their cloud costs via accounts, tags, products or departments.

name: Althea
description: Operator of an online e-commerce marketplace designed to offer beauty products. The company's platform offers skincare, makeup, cleanser, face packs, masks and other beauty products, enabling consumers to buy comprehensive skin beauty selections at low prices.

name: AmazingTalker
description: Developer of a robust online learning platform designed to empower learners in their pursuit of any language or subject. The company's services include learning with one-on-one attention and guidance, taking customized courses that fit individual schedule, budget and interests and an immersive language learning environment, enabling learners to take online tutoring from professional online language tutors and teachers.

name: Appionics
description: Developer of non-fungible token (NFT) platform and related applications intended to provide digital property rights services to gamers and internet users. The company leverages gamification and blockchain to develop and market a portfolio of mobile applications, games and also additional products orientated to educational learning, ensuring transparency, security and new business models, enabling users to trade and exchange digital property.

name: Authlete
description: Developer of an OpenID-certified and Financial-Grade API-compliant tool designed to support identity assurance and grant management extensions. The company offers security software that is built on open authorization and OpenID connect access delegation standards, enabling businesses to grant websites or applications access to their information without the need to reveal passwords.

name: Autopass
description: Provider of a cloud-based fintech SaaS (Software as a service) platform designed to offer end-to-end solutions for operators such as parking lots, gas stations, and charging spots. The company's platform integrates license plate recognition technology (LPR) to provide cashless payment options in all roadside parking spaces to build a broader ecosystem, thereby enabling drivers to complete transactions quickly and efficiently without the need to get out of their cars.

name: Avegant
description: Developer of light field display technology designed for mixed-reality applications. The company's platform offers displays that can enable the visualization of virtual objects across multiple focal planes, replicating the way to view natural objects and enhancing the artificial intelligence journey, enabling users to change how people learn, play, work, and interact with each other through augmented reality experiences.

name: Bilimber Pte. Ltd.
description: Developer of social learning application designed to offer solutions for the exams. The company's platform allows to practice, prepare, and connect students to top tutors instantly through a one-on-one live video call.

name: BluAge
description: Developer of an online real estate platform designed to help customers search for a property using the Internet. The company's platform matches agents with customers, enabling buyers to interact with agencies and get access to the property rapidly and cost-effectively.

name: Bounty Hunter
description: Operator of a creative competition platform intended for brands to run creative contests. The company's platform is a channel for creative people to realize and chase their dreams by, enabling creative people with the opportunity to show their success, let themselves shine through the competition, and at the same time provide a complete portfolio so that creators can put their creative works on and share with each other, and learn and grow.

name: Boxc
description: Developer of an e-commerce logistics management platform designed to eliminate the limitations of standard shipping and logistics solutions. The company's platform leverages the existing and underutilized infrastructure and provides all the tools for international e-commerce logistics management in a single platform, enabling logistics companies and e-commerce retailers to build their own international shipping solutions.

name: BRICKS
description: Developer and operator of a digital platform designed for building interactive apps. With visual dynamic presentation technology and code-free software and hardware data concatenation, the company's low-code/no-code platform develops digital display contents suitable for billboards, kiosk, self-service machine and other screen application, enabling designers to improve content development efficiency and convenience.

name: BSOS
description: Operator of a B2B supply chain fintech company intended to solve the asset liquidity problem by blockchain and DeFi. The company's SaaS sustainable working capital management platform offers to democratize the global liquidity market and optimizes payment terms within the supply chain and uses blockchain to form trusted real-world assets, thereby helping businesses get liquidity, realize high-efficiency asset transactions that make supply chain financing easier and far more efficient.

name: CAPS
description: Operator of clinic chain management business intended to offer health management support services. The company's services include operating the clock fitness gym, online health counseling services and medical institution management promotion services, enabling healthcare organizations to help improve patient satisfaction.

name: ChannelMeter
description: Developer of brand influencer management platform designed to offer online video marketing services. The company's platform discovers talent, onboards influencers, tracks campaigns, data analytics, payout automation, and reports metrics, enabling businesses to grow successful media content around creators.

name: Chikaku
description: Developer of an electronic device designed to connect remote family members. The company's device sends content, photos and videos taken with smartphones directly to the TV, enabling grandparents and family members living far away to interact with their grandchildren and relatives.

name: Asiabiome
description: Provider of biotechnology service intended to accelerate drug discovery for live bio-therapeutics. The company's service includes a microbiota bank, a clinical intervention platform, and core big data technology that powers their bioinformatics pipeline, enabling researchers to characterize the Asian gut microbiome and understand the varying profiles across country regions.

name: Cocos
description: Developer of a decentralized gaming and digital assets development platform designed to support multiple blockchain systems. The company's platform creates an integrated multi-platform runtime environment which brings a whole new gaming experience, and an unprecedented gaming status wherein all the assets obtained in the games are wholly owned by the gamers, thus providing developers with the convenience and completeness of game development.

name: Coolso
description: Developer of a gesture technology intended to focus on muscle biosensors integrating augmented reality and virtual reality. The company's technology recognizes detailed information such as muscle fatigue, gesture, and strength level, enabling clients to get wearable gesture control and rehabilitation remedies.

name: Crescendo Lab
description: Developer of a marketing technology intended for artificially intelligent marketing. The company provides LINE official account marketing, one-on-one in-depth interaction, enhance brand favor, promote sales, expand member data management, connect with the customer relationship management system, helping organizations gradually realize marketing automation.

name: Cube.js
description: Developer of an analytical application platform designed to build internal business intelligence tools and add customer-facing analytics to existing applications. The company's platform effectively handles data volumes up to trillions of data points and provides built-in security and scales to thousands of customers, enabling clients to fetch data instead of pre-built visualizations.

name: DayDayCook
description: DDC Enterprise Ltd is a content driven consumer brand offering easy, convenient ready-to-heat , ready-to-cook and plant-based meal products i.e. meal products consisting largely or solely of vegetables, fruits, grains and other foods derived from plant-based protein, rather than animal protein) while promoting healthier lifestyle choices to Millennial and Generation Z customer-base. It is also engaged in the provision of advertising services and the operation of experience stores to offer cooking classes.

name: Dyad
description: Provider of an educational consulting platform designed to provide mentorship for talented and determined individuals. The company's educational consulting platform offers assistance and consulting services to international students during their university admission processes and helps them to take their decision wisely, enabling users to get motivated and develop the skills and network needed to launch an international career.

name: Earthgen Tech
description: Developer of drones designed for agriculture in Taiwan. The company focuses on drones technology which can be applied in farming, such as manual sraying of pesticides, enabling farmers to improve efficiency.

name: Easyship
description: Developer of an online platform designed to provide cross-border logistic services to eCommerce companies. The company's platform provides the trusted tools to fulfill orders, scale growth, elevate customer experiences, and also provides access to more than a hundred shipping companies, enabling clients to get an end-to-end process for pickup, packing, labeling, shipping, and tracking of goods easily.

name: ELKROOM
description: Developer of game launcher designed to optimize the gaming experience. The company offers a game launcher to assist mobile game players so that they can have a better experience playing games on mobile phones and can also record every moment of playing, enabling players to optimize and speed up their phones so they can enjoy playing without any delay.

name: EMQ
description: Operator of a financial settlement network intended to optimize cross-border remittances. The company operates a cross-border settlement network that provides affordable, efficient and transparent financial settlement for global businesses, enabling users to have a settlement network that makes cross-border remittances streamlined, neutral, low-cost, secure, and real-time.

name: EventXtra
description: Developer of virtual event platform designed to help enterprises manage big events online. The company's platform allows enterprises to have their exhibitions, job fairs and trade shows online, provides real time registration, event management services and event organizing services that helps event organizers with guest check-ins and walk-in on-site registration, providing a one-stop platform for event management and organization.

name: ExCo
description: Provider of an online payment platform and loan service designed to give consumers peace of mind and increase conversion and sales. The company's platform offers to make cardless e-commerce payments and helps in peer-to-peer lending, enabling consumers to boost conversion and live profitably.

name: Firstory
description: All in one podcast platform with monetization solutions

name: Five Jack
description: Provider of an e-commerce gaming platform intended to make changes for gaming industry in terms of e-commerce. The company's e-commerce gaming platform Itemku, focuses on trading virtual game items in Indonesia, enabling gamers to buy and trade in gaming currency, as a means of strengthening their game characters and to make money.

name: Fox-Tech
description: Developer of a data analytics IoT platform designed to monitor, track and improve the operation of farming, logistics, cold chain and manufacturing businesses. The company's software combines real-time data, easy-to-use applications with secure, low power, and high accuracy sensors of temperature and humidity, helping business owners mitigate crises across the value chain in over 24 countries worldwide.

name: freeD
description: Developer of an AI-enabled platform designed to offer comprehensive digital solutions. The company's platform helps companies manage their sales and marketing using Artificial intelligence (AI), Big Data, and Machine Learning technologies, providing customers with comprehensive digital solutions.

name: Funway
description: Operator of card game show and competitive tournaments. The company hosts mahjong events throughout Taiwan, enabling players to stay connected through competitive tournaments.

name: AWAKENS
description: Developer of a personal DNA cloud data upload application designed to make people connect DNA data with insights, products, and research. The company's platform allows members to upload their raw DNA data files and discover their DNA identities and traits through intuitive visualization and scientific-educational content, enabling members to learn about their DNA data while ensuring ultimate transparency.

name: GITAI
description: Operator of a space robotics startup intended to conduct tasks in all realms of space development. The company's remote-controlled robots feature low-latency communication and NAT traversal system as well as provide an alternative to human astronauts for long-time work in low earth orbit space stations, enabling space development organizations to reduce the burden on astronauts, shorten the time it takes to perform work in space and reduce costs.

name: GoSky AI
description: Developer of social customer relationship management software (CRM) intended to improve marketing accuracy and efficiency. The company applies artificial intelligence technology for R&D of social CRM, its main products include member loyalty platform, marketing chatbot and advertisement deployment, enabling brands to convert their social media followers into prospective customers in a convenient way.

name: Graffer
description: Developer of a compliance platform designed to simplify the process of submitting commercial documents to the government in Japan. The company's platform offers a corporate and regulation directory and procedural guides by digitizing government paperwork, enabling Japanese business owners to file regulatory documents and receive guidance on complex issues through a single platform.

name: Blue Square Group Limited
description: Developer of an online trading platform designed to trade in hybrid derivatives exchange. The company's platform uses ZK-powered volition technology to separate exchange and custody functions, enabling clients to eliminate counterparty risk and take full control of the assets.

name: HelperGo
description: Developer of domestic service online platform designed to match families with well-trained helpers for household and eldercare needs. The company's application directly connects families in need of professional home care services (house cleaning, eldercare, babysitters, and cooking) to service providers, such as babysitters and caregivers, enabling people in need for local services to save money and improve the lifestyle while helping service providers find jobs easier.

name: HiCustomer
description: Developer of a customer success platform designed to offer management tools to improve customer relationships. The company's platform aggregates and visualizes customer information such as usage status, communication history, sales, contact information, and many more, enabling clients to fully utilize the resources of their customer success team.

name: Homexin
description: Developer of a healthcare platform designed to find healthcare services in hospitals for those who need them. The company's platform uses machine learning techniques to find the best match for caregivers introduces alternative short-period care services to enlarge the total capacity of caregivers and utilizes artificial intelligence technology to instill efficiency and quality in the caregiver system, enabling patients to connect with medical professionals.

name: hotcake 夯客
description: Developer of merchant SaaS systems used in nail, eyelash, hairdressing and beauty industries. The company's products can be built with a dedicated reservation, membership and POS system, and integrates with user social media accounts, enabling users build fast access to live operations.

name: iChase
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence poultry health monitoring system designed to provide poultry physiological monitoring and disease prevention. The company's system is a remote monitoring system using computer vision, guided laser beams, an electronic weighing machine and control software built on machine learning, enabling farmers to boost productivity by monitoring poultry birds' health and maturity.

name: Iman
description: Operator of a financial technology platform intended for investors, merchants, and shoppers. The company's platform offers users a mobile application with investment and cash management services, credit payment services, and an online shopping platform, enabling users to invest and get funding ethically and in line with religious views and faith.

name: Infostellar
description: Developer of a cloud-based satellite antenna-sharing platform designed to provide convenient, efficient communications infrastructure for humanity's ongoing space expansion. The company's platform helps in transmission at a lower cost while passing on revenue to antenna owners in the network, enabling businesses to share their antennas during idle time.

name: iPrice
description: Developer of an online price comparison platform designed to provide information for multi-category products. The company's product catalog includes electronic products, fashion apparel, home improvements, baby products, accessories and commercial content, enabling users to find affordable products across multiple online retail sites and purchase them easily.

name: JMEM
description: Developer of One time programmable Memory (OTP) technology, designed to provide high-security usage such as data storage and function activation. The company's new multi-state memory is designed to address the shortcomings of existing disposable memory, such as inadequate security and large size, which takes advantage of polysilicon and High-K and different component structures that can be easily stacked and at low cost, providing users with security solutions in the IoT industry, automotive and electronic products.

name: P2P, Inc.
description: Provider of insurance services intended to offer small and short-term insurance services. The company offers mobile-native, data-driven innovative insurance products and digital platforms which connect insurance products to various services, enabling clients to get insurance easily and provide new products to the market with new technologies, creating an impact on society.

name: Kakehashi
description: Developer of a pharmacy experience platform designed to support patient satisfaction and work style reforms in pharmacies. name: Ulysses

name: Koska
description: Developer of an accounting platform designed to fully visualize invisible costs. The company's platform has a unique ability to visualize the site required for production control and to offer real-time cost accounting calculations, enabling the manufacturing industry to monitor operations as well as the cost of production of their fixed assets which leads to the identification and improvement of profitability.

name: Krunch
description: Developer of cloud-based marketing analytic tool catering to its clients in Hong Kong. The company's software helps its clients to do social monitoring, channel attribution, user segmentation and predictive analytics in the developer context, helping the marketing field in analyzing the rapidly growing audience.

name: Linguatrip
description: Developer of an online platform designed to offer foreign language learning from anywhere in the world. The company's platform connects learners to language immersions abroad and offers students booking and accommodation facilities, enabling students to find suitable courses from a wide selection of accredited schools at discounted rates.

name: Logiless
description: Developer of an inventory management platform designed to collectively manage orders and inventory. The company's platform automates the work of e-commerce business from ordering to shipping eliminating manual work from order receipt to shipment, realizing speedy shipment, enabling warehouse operators to improve their productivity.

name: Lootex

The company specializes in providing a game-oriented NFT marketplace and fraud-free ecosystem, enabling users to trade and discover the assets in the metaverse and also make virtual assets real by helping digital creators to protect their works.

name: MicroBenefits
description: Provider of a mobile application designed to offer employee retention and corporate training services. The company's application creates opportunity for employees while improving operational efficiency and employee productivity, enabling businesses to retain their employees and improving its performance.

name: Moviation
description: Develper of an air mobility platform intended to provide safety and convenience based on expertise and data. The company's platform uses the inherent value of mobilization by utilizing conventional helicopters and eventually replacing all fleets with eVTOLs, enabling clients to get pleasant and quality mobility experiences.

name: My China Roots
description: We empower Asians to trace their ancestry and connect with roots & relatives; starting with Overseas Chinese.

name: Oddup
description: Developer of a data-driven research platform designed to provide analytical information on startups. The company's platform offers analysis of startups, investors and ecosystems, enabling investors to make informed investment decision with data, rating and a viewpoint.

name: OEN
description: Developer of a unified payment platform designed for nonprofits, campaigns, and organizations. The company's platform features include payments, fundraising, engagement, and compliance such as donations, e-commerce, ticketing, and subscriptions, easily setting up hosted fundraising websites and customizing call-to-actions, gaining insights into the target audience, and creating meaningful engagement based on the dynamic supporter database, enabling organizations to abide local laws and regulations.

name: Omate
description: Developer of smart wearables designed to track and monitor vital signs. The company leverages technology to design and manufacture smart watches which monitor temperature, heart rate, sleep monitoring, GPS for kids watches, and fitness tracking, and also provides enterprise IoT solutions, enabling customers to better track and monitor their health.

name: Onmygrad
description: Developer of a talent solution platform for campus recruitment and talent onboarding. The company's platform connects university students with potential employers, enabling fresh graduates to seek career opportunities easily online.

name: Pawdly

The company connects pet owners with pet care providers, such as dog walkers, groomers and trainers, enabling pet owners to provide a variety of features that help pet owners to find reliable and trustworthy pet care providers.

name: PopChill
description: Developer of a social eCommerce platform designed for second-hand trade. The company generates an online marketplace for second-hand trade, enabling users to share their fashion styles and sell idle items.

name: Preteckt
description: Building the AI vehicle diagnostic technician.

name: PurismEV

The company offers various services such as reducing environmental impact, increasing vehicle lifetime, reducing battery size, improving range performance, increasing energy efficiency, and improving acceleration, providing users with real-time vehicle monitoring.

name: InfuseAI

The company's MLOps platform provides cluster-computing, one-click research environments, dataset loading, and management of various resources and access-control services for machine learning models, enabling data scientists to stay informed and focused on training and running their models. The platform gives IT leaders flexibility and administration authority to configure resources and settings for their teams.

name: Rosetta.ai

The company's platform uses artificial intelligence technology to enhance customer conversion and retention by analyzing consumer preferences, and predicting inventory, and recommending products for online and offline during shopping flow, enabling e-commerce businesses to increase conversion and order value.

name: Rovilus
description: Developer of battery technologies designed to accelerate the adoption of clean energy. The company's technologies develop products that use thermal management technology to provide batteries made of fire-suppression material and have an extended lifetime, enabling companies to increase their operational efficiency and reduce their total cost of operation.

name: Sakana AI Kabushiki Kaisha
description: Operator of an AI-enabled information technology company headquartered in Tokoyo, Japan. The company specializes in developing a generative AI model and software that can generate text, images, code, and multimedia, enabling clients to collaborate on research and development of generative AI.

name: Sciket

The company's platform offers multiple payment options, cross-device compatibility, price transparency, commodity consulting service and artificial intelligence-backed recommendations for each user's needs, enabling research practitioners to find their desired products with accuracy, speed and convenience and have an innovative research shopping experience.

name: Sorock

Additionally, the company aims to target not only the domestic market but also the Japanese market from the early stages.

name: Souco

The company's platform offers a nationwide network of storage spaces that can be rented on demand, enabling customers to find storage options for their needs, whether they need to store inventory, furniture or personal belongings.

name: Spacee

The company's platform offers a wide variety of rooms, from cheap to high-grade, such as private rental conference rooms, training, study sessions, seminar venues, rental kitchens, photography studios, and party rental rooms, enabling clients to book open meeting rooms in nearby offices.

name: Spaceship
description: Spaceship powers global e-commerce with one platform for shipping and fulfillment.

name: Squares
description: Squares transforms the process of event hosting and workspace flexibility with a platform that gives you access to 2000+ locations where you can work, meet and create.

name: Sumutasu
description: Operator of an AI-based real estate marketplace intended to help homeowners to sell their properties. name: Surglasses

The company's platform offers AR surgery for orthopedics and neurosurgery in high-performance surgical systems and educational products. enabling healthcare professionals to perform surgeries with precision and efficiency and advanced innovative products for medical education.

name: Terminal 3
description: Provider of Web3 data solutions intended to protect users' privacy information. The company leverages decentralized storage and zero-knowledge proofs to allow secure information access, enabling clients to securely store their data, control its access permissions and use across applications and websites.

name: TG3D Studio
description: Provider and developer of digitization designed for fashion industry. The company provides body and fabric digitization using 3D technology, enabling clients with design, manufacturing and innovative online shopping experience.

name: TNL Mediagene (News Lens Key Review Network Co., Ltd.)

The company's platform can be used by users to book flight tickets and make hotel reservations along with an opportunity to earn reward points, enabling travelers to accumulate, redeem points, and get discounts on travel bookings.

The company's services provide individual identity confirmation API, personal number acquisition API, risk check API, and mailing API, amongst other offerings, enabling individuals, businesses, and corporate clients to authenticate their digital identity in a convenient and hassle-free manner.

name: VCV

The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence for autonomously searching resumes and conducting video interviews, enabling employers to reduce efforts, increase efficiency, and save money and manpower.

name: WeGrow asia CO.
description: Developer of an AI-powered greenhouse cultivation management platform designed for developing IoT sensing and control systems. The company offers necessary planting data, technical labor and sales channels, enabling young farmers to get interest in agriculture.

name: Whill

The company connects the world with personal transportation solutions, in addition to designing and selling mobility vehicles it provides mobility-as-a-service, offering autonomous transportation services as well as on-site fleet and short-term rental services that make public spaces such as airports, hospitals, and vacation destinations more accessible, enabling customers to drive on public roads without the need for a driver's license and empowering wheelchair users to lead a liberating lifestyle.

name: Xing Mobility

The company develops advanced energy storage and electric drive technology using the development of extreme performance race cars and supercars as their research and development platform and immersed cooling battery system, which can be applied to a wide range of electric vehicles and energy storage systems, thereby creating a stable and safe thermal management solution for battery systems, and providing a safer and more reliable option for the industrial energy transition aiming to create a sustainable world.

name: YAS
description: Operator of a mircoinsurance marketplace. The company utilizes big data and artificial intelligence to offer affordable and suitable insurance coverage to users, enabling consumers to enjoy a more user-centric insurance purchasing experience.

name: Zehitomo
description: Operator of an online matching platform intended to match people with highly specialized professionals. The company's platform offers a space where users can connect with experts from various fields such as photography, online lessons, and many more, and receive the required service, enabling local professionals to grow their businesses and increase profitability through volume.

name: Klarity

The company's analytics platform allows data discovery from multiple social and online sources, particularly Chinese-specific platforms, transforming granular data into reliable social intelligence enabling marketers, researchers and analysts to monitor social media sites and benchmark performance, identify market trends and gain in-depth insights into social behavior.

name: Upteam

The company's platform offers a collection of certified pre-owned, vintage and collectible merchandise including handbags, apparel, watches, spectacles, jewelry and accessories, of renowned brands, enabling customers to buy high-end luxury vintage goods at an affordable price.

name: ClassAction

The company's Web platform lets its users share cases of damage, track viewers and others who might have faced a similar kind of damage, seek legal advice and guidance by connecting to lawyers and civil engineers, enabling citizens and victims to litigate legal hassles, compensate their loss, raise funds and lodge lawsuits in real-time.

name: Pocket Menu
description: Provider of an application platform intended to be used for booking restaurant. The company's platform provides online booking and payment service with high-end restaurants in Japan for mobile & PC browser users, enabling them to enjoy the great food culture of Japan without any stress including language and payment barrier.

name: Breaker
description: Tokyo-based social media branding agency connecting the world to Japan.

name: Kuraseru
description: Developer of a medical enterprise software designed to connect patients with professional care managers. The company's software provides a tool that can retrieve optimum nursing facility information instantaneously, enabling users to choose their treatment provider smartly.

name: Anglers
description: Anglers is an app that connect fishermen whose keen on recording and sharing their latest catch of the sea.

name: Leflair
description: Provider of an e-commerce platform intended to offer foreign brands in Vietnam. The company's online platform is engaged in the sale of women's and men's fashion, beauty, home and kids products, enabling customers to find and buy international branded products at good deal.

name: Prenetics
description: Developer of a pharmacogenomics platform designed to offer personalized, predictive and preventive treatments. The company's pharmacogenomics platform offers a health-coaching application that provides individuals with a DNA profile in order to facilitate optimal diet, fitness and response to drugs and enables them to understand their genetic risk of common health conditions such as Type 2 Diabetes, High Blood Pressure and High Cholesterol, enabling physicians to help patients identify the right drug, right dosage and to list out potential adverse drug effects (ADEs), based on one's genetic profile platform.

name: Regulus
description: Recruiting automation

name: Deal Connect
description: Developing a logistics optimization service for scrap metal industry

name: Omise
description: Operator of full-featured payment management platform designed to connect millions of customers across the world. The company's payment management platform is easy to setup and works seamlessly across multiple devices, providing fraud detection, data privacy and highly secured transactions, enabling users to manage their funds whenever they want.

name: TokyoOtakuMode
description: Provider of an eCommerce site and social media page created to share Japanese otaku culture products and news with the world. The company's eCommerce site and social media page work directly with manufactures and independent creators to provide an authentic and curated selection of merchandise and popular news, enabling Japanese pop culture fans to receive the latest in otaku culture.
